name: Ronnie Foster
abstract: Ronnie Foster (born May 12, 1950) is an American funk and soul jazz organist, and record producer. His albums recorded for Blue Note Records in the 1970s have gained a cult following after the emergence of acid jazz.

concerts.label: An Evening with Jon Lucien, featuring Special Guests Stanley Turrentine and George Benson
Midnight Performance: An Evening with Jon Lucien
Newport Jazz Festival: Jon Lucien, George Benson Quintet, and Milt Jackson

about_quotes.speaker: Bobby Militello
about_quotes.evidence: Ronnie Foster and I used to skip out of school during lunch and go over to my brother’s place... Ronnie and I would go blow for a couple of hours
about_quotes.doc_title: Bobby Militello interviewed by Monk Rowe, Buffalo, New York, October 14, 2002
